# Practical 2 - Data Frames and Plots

::: {.callout-tip .partmenu}

## Practical 2 - Data Frames and Plots

### @sec-p1_basic_dataframe_operations

#### Sections
- @sec-dataset
- @sec-pipe
- @sec-select
- @sec-filter
- @sec-summary_0201

#### Learning Objectives

By the end of this part of the practical you will be able to:

* Use the pipe operator to create multi-step analyses.
* Select specific columns from a dataframe.
* Select rows from a dataframe which meet specific criteria


### @sec-p2_complex_dataframe_operations

#### Sections
- @sec-summary_stats
- @sec-merge
- @sec-long_wide
- @sec-summary_0202

#### Learning Objectives

By the end of this part of the practical you will be able to:

* Calculate summary statistics for groups of observations.
* Merge information from multiple dataframes.
* Convert data from "wide" to "long" format.

### @sec-p3_visualisation

#### Sections
- @sec-plot_recap
- @sec-blank_plot
- @sec-add_points
- @sec-add_map
- @sec-group_points
- @sec-summary_0202

#### Learning Objectives

By the end of this part of the practical you will be able to:

* Generate a new blank plot and add axes.
* Add points to a scatter plot.
* Calculate appropriate axis limits and add these to the plot.
* Change the colours and shapes of the points based on caegorical data.
* Add paths connecting points based on categorical data.
